title: Claims Processing Failed Due to Missing Input File
content:
Claims_Processing_Daily failed at 06:05 IST with FileNotFoundException for /data/claims/batch_20250215.csv.

Root Cause: The upstream Input_File_Generator workflow timed out at 05:45 due to high database load during nightly backup window (04:00-06:00). The batch file was never created.

Resolution: Waited for backup to complete, manually triggered Input_File_Generator at 06:30, then restarted Claims_Processing_Daily. All downstream workflows (Report_Aggregator, Email_Notification) completed by 08:00.

Prevention: Moved Input_File_Generator schedule from 05:30 to 06:15 (after backup window). Added pre-check step to Claims_Processing_Daily that verifies input file exists before starting.

metadata.summary: Claims batch failed — missing input file due to upstream timeout during backup window
metadata.root_cause: Input_File_Generator timed out during nightly backup window, no batch file produced
metadata.resolution: Rescheduled upstream workflow after backup window, added input file pre-check
